No API design issues found. This is the initial release (`1.0.0-beta.1`) of `@azure/arm-horizondb`. The package version aligns with the preview API version (`2026-01-20-preview`), the user agent in `horizonDbContext.ts` matches the package version, the CHANGELOG first entry is correct, and no naming issues (`_N`, `AutoGenerated`, `_` prefixes), type-safety issues, or export problems were found.

## Next Steps to Merge
Only failed checks and required actions are listed below.

All CI checks have passed ✅. The PR is blocked pending required reviewer approvals (CODEOWNERS: `@qiaozha`, `@MaryGao`, `@JialinHuang803`). `@JialinHuang803` has already approved — please obtain approval from `@MaryGao` and/or `@qiaozha` to proceed.
